message:
feat(conformance): add masked array differential test suite and expand string fixtures

Add a complete masked array differential conformance suite that exercises
MaskedArray operations (add, equal, greater_than, filled, compressed,
reshape, concatenate, anom, fix_invalid, shrink_mask) against golden-value
fixtures. This mirrors the pattern established by the string and polynomial
differential suites.

New fixture file: masked_differential_cases.json (228 lines, 9 golden-value
cases covering mask propagation through binary ops, fill/compress, reshape
with mask preservation, concatenation along axis, anomaly deviation, and
NaN/Inf fix-up).

New types and functions in lib.rs:
- MaskedDifferentialCase: deserialization struct for the fixture schema,
  including lhs/rhs shapes, values, masks, fill_value, axis, reshape_shape,
  nan_indices, inf_indices, and expected outcomes.
- MaskedOperationOutcome (Array | Masked): discriminated result type that
  captures plain arrays (filled, compressed) vs masked arrays with optional
  mask vectors.
- MaskedSuiteError: error type with reason_code for structured diagnostics.
- run_masked_differential_suite: top-level runner that loads fixtures,
  executes operations, validates expectations with configurable abs/rel
  tolerance, and writes a JSON report artifact.
- execute_masked_differential_operation: dispatcher for the 10 supported ops.
- validate_masked_differential_expectation: shape + value + mask checker
  supporting expect_mask_none sentinel.
- masked_values_to_array: constructs MaskedArray from fixture fields with
  NaN/Inf injection.
- masked_array_to_outcome / map_*_error helpers.
- Wired into run_all_core_suites and added masked_differential_suite_is_green
  test.

Also expands string_differential_cases.json with 9 new golden-value cases:
capitalize_ascii, lstrip/rstrip unicode whitespace, swapcase_ascii,
not_equal/greater/less/less_equal unicode comparisons, and
compare_chararrays >= operator.

Import list updated to pull in BinaryOp, MAError, and MaskedArray from
fnp_ufunc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
